R0234.title: Merchant Cash-Out and Fake Transaction Fraud
R0234.definition: Merchants use fake orders, circular transactions, or abnormal refunds to cash out and transfer funds.
keywords: Merchant Cash-Out and Fake Transaction Fraud
R0234.description: Merchants use fake orders, circular transactions, or abnormal refunds to cash out and transfer funds.
R0234.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
